---
title: Measure for Measure
subtitle: Portland State University
author: Karin Magaldi
date: 02/01/2024
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
image: measure/cover_measure.avif
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
toc: false
page-layout: full
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Director"
  title-block-published: "Date"
include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h1.title {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        p.subtitle {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-heading {
          display: none;
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-contents {
          display: none;
        }
        </style>
---

## Photos

| | | |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| ![](measure/measure_1.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} | ![](measure/measure_2.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} | ![](measure/measure_3.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} |
| ![](measure/measure_4.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} | ![](measure/measure_5.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} | ![](measure/measure_6.avif){group="measure" .lightbox} |

: {.custom-table}
